description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a rustic, wooden exterior with a weathered appearance, accented by green moss and creeping vines that give it an overgrown, abandoned look. The front panel displays a screen with the words 'LOST STATION' and 'Press to play', surrounded by cracks and a dark, mysterious background. The control panel is equipped with a joystick and two buttons, each colored differently, and is decorated with a single red flower and more vine details. The side panels are adorned with large, stylized pink flowers and additional vines, enhancing the natural, reclaimed-by-nature theme. The top of the cabinet is capped with a green, mossy surface, and the back is plain wood with visible bolts and more vine patterns. The overall design suggests a fantasy or post-apocalyptic arcade experience, blending technology with nature.
description: A wooden arcade game cabinet overgrown with vines and moss, featuring a cracked screen, colorful controls, and floral side panel artwork.
description_view_0: The front view shows the screen with 'LOST STATION' text, a cracked display, and a control panel with a joystick, two buttons, and vine decorations.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights a large pink flower, green vines, and the protruding control panel with joystick and buttons.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain wooden back with green moss on top and vertical vine patterns, with no controls or screen visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a pink flower, vines, and the side profile of the control panel and joystick.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium-sized with a thick bezel and visible cracks on the display
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and two buttons, spaced apart, with a red flower and vine motif on a wooden panel
attribute_marquee_artwork: The marquee features the text 'LOST STATION' in a distressed font, with a mossy green top and no additional imagery
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Side panels are decorated with large pink flowers, green vines, and a wood grain pattern, contributing to a nature-reclaimed theme
